use_cases: Download software installers or applications from a website
Enable users to download digital assets like PDFs, images, or documents
Provide a compact expandable download trigger that saves screen space
Initiate file downloads with a single click action
Trigger downloadable content in e-commerce or media platforms
ai_summary: A compact download button that starts as a circular icon and expands horizontally on hover to reveal 'Download' text. Built with framer-motion for smooth CSS-like transitions, featuring a solid red background with white typography. The button uses a space-efficient interaction pattern where the icon transforms into labeled text, making it ideal for toolbars, cards, or space-constrained download areas.
